<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-hâi]][[de:Feuer-Schwein]][[fr:Cochon de feu]][[hak:Tên-hoi]][[ja:丁亥]][[ko:정해]][[nds:Füür-Swien]][[vi:Đinh Hợi]][[za:Dinghaih]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-hāi]][[zh-yue:丁亥]][[zh:丁亥]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-hâi]][[de:Feuer-Schwein]][[fr:Cochon de feu]][[hak:Tên-hoi]][[ja:丁亥]][[ko:정해]][[nds:Füür-Swien]][[vi:Đinh Hợi]][[za:Dinghaih]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-hāi]][[zh-yue:丁亥]][[zh:丁亥]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-hâi]][[de:Feuer-Schwein]][[fr:Cochon de feu]][[hak:Tên-hoi]][[ja:丁亥]][[ko:정해]][[nds:Füür-Swien]][[vi:Đinh Hợi]][[za:Dinghaih]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-hāi]][[zh-yue:丁亥]][[zh:丁亥]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Pig|kanji=丁亥|romaji=hinoto i|onyomi=teigai|p=dīhài|w=ting-hai|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ xaɪ̯|y=deng1 hoi6|j=deng1 hoi6|ci=tɛŋ hɐi|mc=tæŋ ɣəi|oc-bs=tæŋ ɢəʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Pig also known as 丁亥''' (hinotoi, teika no inoshishi, teigai) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 24th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yang Fire Dog]] and followed by [[Yang Earth Rat]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Hinoto (丁)]] represents yin [[Fire (wuxing)|Fire (火)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Pig (zodiac)|Pig (亥)]] represents yin [[Water (wuxing)|Water (水)]], establishing a restraining relationship ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)]]) (i.e. Water overcomes Fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Fire Pig (丁亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīnghài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: teikai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeonghae (정해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Hợi

<!--
==
* Yin Fire Pig (丁亥) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīnghài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 hoi6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: ひのといのしし (hinoto-inoshishi)
***Onyomi: ていかのいのしし (teika-no-inoshishi)
***Onyomi: ていがい (teigai)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): jeonghae
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Hợi

-->
==Years of Yin Fire Pig==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 27 when divided by 60 is a [[Year|year]] of [[Yin Fire Pig]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Fire Pig (丁亥)'s years table'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 27|27 AD]]
* [[AD 87|87 AD]]
* [[AD 147|147 AD]]
* [[207|207 AD]]
* [[267|267 AD]]
* [[327|327 AD]]
* [[387|387 AD]]
* [[447|447 AD]]
* [[507|507 AD]]
* [[567|567 AD]]
* [[627|627 AD]]
* [[687|687 AD]]
* [[AD 747|747 AD]]
* [[807|807 AD]]
* [[867|867 AD]]
* [[927|927 AD]]
* [[987|987 AD]]
|
* [[1047|1047 AD]]
* [[1107|1107 AD]]
* [[1167|1167 AD]]
* [[1227|1227 AD]]
* [[1287|1287 AD]]
* [[1347|1347 AD]]
* [[1407|1407 AD]]
* [[1467|1467 AD]]
* [[1527|1527 AD]]
* [[1587|1587 AD]]
* [[1647|1647 AD]]
* [[1707|1707 AD]]
* [[1767|1767 AD]]
* [[1827|1827 AD]]
* [[1887|1887 AD]]
* [[1947|1947 AD]]
|
* [[2007|2007 AD]]
* [[2067 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2127 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2187 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2247 AD]]
* [[24th century|2307 AD]]
* [[24th century|2367 AD]]
* [[2427 AD]]
* [[2487 AD]]
* [[2547 AD]]
* [[2607 AD]]
* [[2667 AD]]
* [[2727 AD]]
* [[2787 AD]]
* [[2847 AD]]
* [[2907 AD]]
* [[2967 AD]]
|}

=== Events ===
* In [[Empress Jitō|Jitō Tennō]]'s 1st year (687 AD) – from the Asukaike Kōbō Ruins, [[Fuhonsen|Tomihon-sen]] were detected and wooden tablets inscribed with "丁亥年" were unearthed from the same soil layer, leading to the estimation that the Tomihon-sen were cast during this period.
* In [[Ōei]] 14 (January 1408 AD) – the [[1408 Ōei earthquake]] occurred; it may have been confused with the Hōei Earthquake, which falls within the same Sexagenary cycle.
* In [[Hōei]] 4 (1707 AD) – the "Teigai no Hen" (Crisis of 亥) occurred, marked by the [[1707 Hōei earthquake|Hōei Earthquake]]<ref>[https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1390572174727612416 都司嘉宣(1981)] 都司嘉宣編: 高知県地震津波史料, 防災科学技術研究資料 57, i-253, 1981-03-20, 独立行政法人防災科学技術研究所</ref> and the [[Hōei eruption|Hōei Great Eruption]].
* From January 25 to February 6, 2008 – the Teigai Snow Disaster occurred; since this period fell before the Lunisolar's New Year (正月) and Spring Festival (春節), it is considered part of a Teigai year.

==Months of Yin Fire Pig==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Kanoe (庚)]] or [[Kinoto (乙)]]), the month of [[October]] is designated as the [[Month|month (calendar)]] of [[Yin Fire Pig]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the [[Solar term]] (from [[Lidong|Beginning of Winter]] until the day before [[Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Pig==
The [[Senjitsu]] for [[Yin Fire Pig]] is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of [[Yin Fire Pig]] is the 4th day of [[Ten directions]].

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}
== References ==
{{Reflist|2|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Teng-chik]]
[[zh-yue:丁亥]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Fire Pig|qq=ja|丁亥|version=102335828|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Dĭng-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Holt-Varkvi]]
[[de:Yin Fire Pig]]

[[ja:丁亥]]
[[zh:丁亥]]
[[ko:정해]]
[[fr:Cochon de feu]]
[[de:Feuer-Schwein]]

[[af:Vuurvark (astrologie)]]
[[de:Feuer-Schweineen]]
[[en:Fire Pig]]
[[fr:Cochon de feushak]]
[[it:Ding-chṳ́id]]

[[vi:Đinh Hợi]]
[[za:Dingceij]]
[[ar:Yin Fire Pig]]

<!--Yin Fire Pig--><!--Yin Fire Pig-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Dĭng-hâi]]
[[hak:Tên-hoi]]
[[nds:Füür-Swien]]
[[za:Dinghaih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Teng-hāi]]
[[zh-yue:丁亥]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Dĭng-hâi]]
[[hak:Tên-hoi]]
[[nds:Füür-Swien]]
[[za:Dinghaih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Teng-hāi]]
[[zh-yue:丁亥]]
{{wikidata link|Q1062894}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
